# @backblaze-labs/b2-sdk

> The official Backblaze B2 Cloud Storage SDK for TypeScript and JavaScript. Zero runtime dependencies. Isomorphic — runs unmodified in Node.js 22.3+, Bun, Deno, browsers, Cloudflare Workers, and Vercel Edge.

## Install

```bash
npm install @backblaze-labs/b2-sdk
```

## Quick start

```ts
import { B2Client, BufferSource } from '@backblaze-labs/b2-sdk'

const client = new B2Client({
  applicationKeyId: process.env.B2_APPLICATION_KEY_ID,
  applicationKey: process.env.B2_APPLICATION_KEY,
})

await client.authorize()
const bucket = await client.getBucket('my-bucket')
const file = await bucket.upload({
  fileName: 'hello.txt',
  source: new BufferSource(new TextEncoder().encode('Hello, B2!')),
  contentType: 'text/plain',
})
```

## Environment variables

The SDK reads no env vars automatically — pass them explicitly at construction:

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `B2_APPLICATION_KEY_ID` | Application key ID from Backblaze console |
| `B2_APPLICATION_KEY` | Application key secret |
| `B2_BUCKET_NAME` | Target bucket name |
| `B2_REGION` | e.g. `us-east-005` |
| `B2_PUBLIC_URL_BASE` | e.g. `https://s3.us-east-005.backblazeb2.com` |

## S3-compatible endpoint

B2 is S3-compatible. When using third-party S3 clients instead of this SDK:

```ts
// Endpoint pattern: https://s3.<region>.backblazeb2.com
const endpoint = `https://s3.${process.env.B2_REGION}.backblazeb2.com`
```

## Core exports

| Import path | What it contains |
|---|---|
| `@backblaze-labs/b2-sdk` | `B2Client`, `Bucket`, `B2Object`, `BufferSource`, `FileSource`, `toContentSource`, public types |
| `@backblaze-labs/b2-sdk/errors` | Typed error classes (`B2Error`, `BadAuthTokenError`, `UploadResponseBodyError`, etc.) |
| `@backblaze-labs/b2-sdk/streams` | `BufferSource`, `BlobSource`, `FileSource`, `StreamSource`, `toContentSource`, hashing helpers |
| `@backblaze-labs/b2-sdk/sync` | `synchronize`, `LocalFolder`, `B2Folder` for local/B2 sync |
| `@backblaze-labs/b2-sdk/raw` | Direct access to B2 native API calls |
| `@backblaze-labs/b2-sdk/s3` | S3-compatible client helpers |
| `@backblaze-labs/b2-sdk/auth` | Auth helpers, `InMemoryAccountInfo` |
| `@backblaze-labs/b2-sdk/auth/file` | Node-only `FileAccountInfo` persistent auth cache |
| `@backblaze-labs/b2-sdk/notifications` | Bucket event notifications |
| `@backblaze-labs/b2-sdk/simulator` | In-process B2 simulator for tests |

## Common patterns

### Upload a file

```ts
// Small file (< part size, ~100 MB) — single request
await bucket.upload({ fileName: 'data.json', source: new BufferSource(bytes), contentType: 'application/json' })

// Large file — automatic multipart with parallel parts
await bucket.upload({ fileName: 'model.bin', source: new BufferSource(largeBuffer) })

// Local file upload without whole-file buffering
import { FileSource, StreamSource, toContentSource } from '@backblaze-labs/b2-sdk/streams'
await bucket.upload({ fileName: 'backup.tar', source: await FileSource.fromPath('/tmp/backup.tar') })

// Streaming upload; size is required for forward-only sources
await bucket.upload({ fileName: 'stream.bin', source: new StreamSource(readableStream, size) })
await bucket.upload({ fileName: 'node-stream.bin', source: toContentSource(nodeReadable, size) })

// Resume a failed multipart upload
await bucket.upload({ fileName: 'large.bin', source, resume: true })
```

### Download a file

```ts
const result = await bucket.file('hello.txt').download()
const text = new TextDecoder().decode(await new Response(result.body).arrayBuffer())
```

### List files

```ts
for await (const file of bucket.paginateFileNames({ prefix: 'logs/' })) {
  console.log(file.fileName, file.contentLength)
}
```

### Delete files

```ts
const info = await bucket.getFileInfoByName('hello.txt')
if (info) await bucket.deleteFileVersion(info.fileName, info.fileId)

// Bulk delete by prefix
for await (const event of bucket.deleteAll({ prefix: 'tmp/' })) {
  if (event.type === 'error') console.warn(event.fileName, event.message)
}
```

### Server-side encryption

```ts
import { EncryptionAlgorithm, EncryptionMode } from '@backblaze-labs/b2-sdk'
await bucket.upload({
  fileName: 'secret.bin',
  source,
  serverSideEncryption: { mode: EncryptionMode.SseB2, algorithm: EncryptionAlgorithm.Aes256 },
})
```

### Application keys

```ts
import { Capability } from '@backblaze-labs/b2-sdk'
const key = await client.createKey({ keyName: 'my-key', capabilities: [Capability.ReadFiles, Capability.WriteFiles] })
```

### In-process simulator (for tests)

```ts
import { B2Simulator } from '@backblaze-labs/b2-sdk/simulator'
const sim = new B2Simulator()
const client = sim.createClient()
await client.authorize()
```

## Error handling

```ts
import { B2Error, BadAuthTokenError } from '@backblaze-labs/b2-sdk/errors'

try {
  await client.authorize()
} catch (err) {
  if (err instanceof BadAuthTokenError) { /* bad credentials */ }
  if (err instanceof B2Error) { console.log(err.status, err.code) }
}
```

## Full API reference

https://backblaze-labs.github.io/b2-sdk-typescript/
